prediction.reasoning: Predicting exact stock prices is inherently complex and subject to numerous unpredictable factors (market news, economic data, company performance, sentiment, etc.). As an AI, I do not have access to real-time market data beyond my last training update, nor can I perform real-time financial analysis or foresee future events. Therefore, the point estimate is set to the current price ($498.00) as a neutral baseline, reflecting the impossibility of a precise prediction without further information. The confidence intervals are estimated based on typical short-term market volatility for a stock of this price range over a 2-day period, acknowledging the high degree of uncertainty involved in stock market movements. These intervals are illustrative and not based on sophisticated financial modeling or predictive analytics, and actual price movements could fall outside these ranges. This is not financial advice.
